title: Privacy Policy
description: At adinfinity, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable privacy laws.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: We may collect the following types of personal information:

items.contact: Contact Information: Name, email address, phone number
items.business: Business Information: Company name, position, industry
items.communication: Communication Data: Messages, inquiries, support requests

technical.title: Technical Information
technical.description: We automatically collect certain technical information when you visit our website:

items.usage: Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent, click patterns
items.device: Device Information: Browser type, operating system, IP address
items.cookies: Cookies and Tracking: Analytics and marketing cookies

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.description: We use your personal information for the following purposes:

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.description: Under GDPR, we process your personal data based on one or more of the following legal bases:

bases.title: Consent
bases.description: When you explicitly consent to our processing of your data for specific purposes

bases.title: Contractual Necessity
bases.description: When processing is necessary to fulfill our contractual obligations

bases.title: Legitimate Interest
bases.description: When we have a legitimate interest that is not overridden by your privacy rights

bases.title: Legal Obligation
bases.description: When processing is required by applicable law or regulation

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.description: We may share your personal information with the following categories of recipients:

categories.title: Service Providers
categories.description: Third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing our users (e.g., email marketing services, analytics providers).

categories.title: Business Partners
categories.description: Trusted business partners with whom we jointly offer services or conduct marketing campaigns.

categories.title: Legal Authorities
categories.description: When required by law, court order, or government regulation, or to protect our rights, property, or safety.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security Measures
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data:

gdprRights.title: Your GDPR Rights
gdprRights.description: Under GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

rights.title: Right to Access
rights.description: Request access to and obtain a copy of your personal data

rights.title: Right to Rectification
rights.description: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data

rights.title: Right to Erasure
rights.description: Request deletion of your personal data (right to be forgotten)

rights.title: Right to Portability
rights.description: Request transfer of your data to another service provider

rights.title: Right to Object
rights.description: Object to processing of your personal data

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected:

periods.title: Retention Periods
items: Legal requirements: As required by applicable law

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.description: Your personal data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA). We ensure adequate protection through appropriate safeguards such as:
safeguards: Adequacy decisions by the European Commission

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your GDPR rights, please contact us:

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer
dpo.description: For data protection matters, you may also contact our Data Protection Officer at the above email address with the subject line "Data Protection Request".

complaints.title: Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaints.description: If you believe that our processing of your personal data infringes GDPR or other privacy laws, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. In Greece, you can contact:

policyUpdates.title: Changes to This Policy
policyUpdates.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or for other operational reasons. We will notify you of any changes by:
methods: Posting the updated policy on our website
Sending email notifications for significant changes
Displaying prominent notices on our website

cta.title: Have Privacy Questions?
cta.description: We're here to help you understand your rights and how we protect your data.
